text.title: Design Tokens Implementation Procedure
text.summary: 8-step procedure to apply Design Tokens Implementation end-to-end against a single input bundle. Each step has explicit input/action/output; gates between steps surface human-review points before binding actions.

step.name: validate
step.action: Wire a `validate` script in CI; fail on schema violation.

step.name: build
step.action: Configure build to emit consumer outputs.

step.name: drift-check
step.action: CI runs build then `git diff --exit-code outputs/`.

step.name: figma-sync
step.action: Decide direction; wire Tokens Studio or document manual sync cadence.

step.name: alias-tests
step.action: Add unit test: every alias resolves to a base; no cycles; no dangling refs.

step.name: changelog
step.action: Add CHANGELOG requirement to PR template; semver rules documented.
